title: Five Nights at Freddy's Blocks
description: A little mod I made that adds a bunch of cool blocks to make building fnaf stuff easier.
body:
# FNaF blocks mod 0.6.0
This mod adds some cool blocks that make building Five Nights at Freddy's builds much easier! Currently there are blocks from FNaF 1, 2, 3, and Security Breach (including doors). There are more blocks planned, but I don't have much time to work on this and it may never be updated.

## This mod is in beta!
This mod is incomplete and probably might not ever be finished, but it is still pretty useful in the state it is in.

### Made With MCreator (I am too lazy to write Java)
